meta.description: Indirect risk signals per country. v1.1: currency uses FLOW (30-day velocity + acceleration), not absolute STOCK — chronic weakness is background noise, acute movement is the signal. Used to enrich Risk Score — not displayed directly on globe.
meta.methodology: stock_vs_flow: drop_pct = cumulative (context only); drop_30d_pct = velocity (the actual signal); accelerating = is the decline speeding up (2nd derivative)

internet.note: Widespread blocking of foreign platforms, VPN throttling

currency.note: Ruble cumulatively weak but stable in recent weeks — background, not acute

currency.note: Rial decline accelerating under renewed sanctions pressure

currency.note: Peso in active freefall — acute, not chronic

power_grid.note: National grid failures, rolling 12-20h daily blackouts

currency.note: Cumulative -99% but recent rate stable — 'stable instability', priced in. NOT an acute signal (stock-vs-flow fix)

currency.note: Kyat gradual managed decline, not acute

currency.note: Birr still adjusting post float reform; rate accelerating
